title: Rhynchophorum obtusifolium
taxonomy: Rhynchophorum obtusifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the order Myrtales and is native to tropical regions. The plant is further classified into the genus Rhynchophorum and is a type of shrub. Rhynchophorum obtusifolium is closely related to other plants in the same family, which are primarily found in Asia and Central America. Its classification is an important aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
uses: Rhynchophorum obtusifolium, a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, has been utilized in traditional medicine.
